trigger: Authority owner does not approve real intake route.
action: Keep real intake blocked and archive privately.

trigger: Privacy owner rejects data fields or notice wording.
action: Remove fields and pause all invitations.
Pause data processing and revise controls.
publicLine: Data controls remain under private review.

trigger: Official Toastmasters route is unclear or disagrees.
Real personal/member/business-sensitive data enters public/demo space.
action: Remove, investigate privately, and pause release.
Revoke all test access and fix permissions.

trigger: Decidim environment cannot meet backup/export/delete needs.
action: Use provider-assisted route or hold build.

trigger: Dean advisory comments identify critical boundary risk.
action: Route to relevant owner; do not treat as approval.

trigger: Public comms overstate readiness or approval.
action: Correct wording and pause further updates.

trigger: Cultural safety or sensitive material concern appears.
action: Stop public processing and route privately.

trigger: Private owner asks to stop, hold, or archive.
action: Respect owner decision and close safely.
publicLine: Pilot status updated without private reasons.
